name: media-plugin
description: Media generation plugin for images, video, music, speech, SVG, sourcing, and visualization workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate or source media assets for projects.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex workflows for image generation, stock sourcing, icon lookup, SVG craft, chart and diagram generation, music generation, video generation, and speech creation.
defaultPrompt: Create image prompts for this landing page.
Generate a chart or diagram for this documentation.
Create a narration plan for this demo video.
